Jeff Bezos Counters Elon Musk-Led DOGE Cost-Cutting Plan, Says America Needs 'Growth Orientation:' Here's What The Amazon Founder Said To Tackle National Debt
data.description: "The way out is by outgrowing them," Jeff Bezos said, referring to economic challenges including the deficit and national debt. He advocated for boosting GDP growth to 3-5% annually while maintaining slower debt growth, rather than focusing on debt reduction itself.
